summary: Iteration 237 - Sovereign Mastery Path Testing Complete. Backend: 19/19 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All MasteryPath features working correctly. /mastery-path route loads with data-testid='mastery-path-page'. Overview tab shows tier ring, tier scale (4 tiers), weighted authority (Gravity 1.0x, Bloom 1.0x). Avenues tab shows 3 avenue cards (Spotless Solutions, Enlightenment Cafe, Tech/Dev Path) with expandable curriculum. Certificates tab shows empty state. Lesson completion flow works - clicking Complete button records progress, shows toast with XP, and updates progress bar. Core Orientation already completed (user at Tier 1). SovereignCrossbar visible on authenticated pages, hidden on /, /auth, /intro. BubblePortal component exists and is wired into OrbitalNavigation. NebulaSphere accepts gravityMultiplier and bloomMultiplier props from SovereignContext.

issues: Credits running low notification appears - expected behavior for test user

critical_code_review_comments: sovereign_mastery.py correctly implements 4-tier progression: Novice/Seeker (core_orientation), Practitioner (10 mixer_collisions), Specialist (avenue_certification), Sovereign (12 units_mastered)
sovereign_mastery.py correctly returns gravity_multiplier and bloom_multiplier based on current tier
sovereign_mastery.py correctly implements 3 avenues with 5 lessons each (total 1100 XP per avenue)
sovereign_mastery.py correctly auto-certifies when all 5 lessons in an avenue are completed
MasteryPath.js correctly implements 3 tabs: Overview, Avenues, Certificates with data-testid attributes
MasteryPath.js correctly shows TierRing SVG with animated progress
MasteryPath.js correctly shows Weighted Authority section with gravity and bloom multipliers
MasteryPath.js correctly shows 4-tier scale with requirements and rewards
MasteryPath.js correctly implements AvenueCard with expandable curriculum and Complete buttons
MasteryPath.js correctly calls POST /api/sovereign-mastery/record on lesson completion
SovereignContext.js correctly fetches mastery multipliers from /api/sovereign-mastery/status
SovereignContext.js correctly exposes masteryTier, gravityMultiplier, bloomMultiplier
OrbitalNavigation.js correctly passes gravityMultiplier and bloomMultiplier to NebulaPlayground
OrbitalNavigation.js correctly manages BubblePortal state with handleBubbleActivate
NebulaSphere.js correctly applies gravityMultiplier to gravity calculations (line 98-99)
NebulaSphere.js correctly applies bloomMultiplier to bloom intensity (line 154)
NebulaSphere.js correctly implements double-tap detection for BubblePortal activation (line 284-286)
BubblePortal.js correctly implements full-screen overlay with clipPath animation
BubblePortal.js correctly implements horizontal scroll with snap for multiple bubbles
BubblePortal.js correctly lazy-loads page components (SuanpanMixer, TradeCircle, StarChart, Meditation, Frequencies)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 237 verified the Sovereign Mastery Path system. Key components: (1) /api/sovereign-mastery/status returns tier info, multipliers, avenue progress, certificates. (2) /api/sovereign-mastery/record handles core_orientation, lesson_complete, mixer_collision, unit_mastered actions. (3) /api/sovereign-mastery/avenues returns 3 avenues with 5 lessons each. (4) /api/sovereign-mastery/certificates returns earned certificates. (5) MasteryPath.js at /mastery-path with 3 tabs (Overview, Avenues, Certificates). (6) Tier multipliers: Tier 1 (1.0x/1.0x), Tier 2 (1.3x/1.4x), Tier 3 (1.8x/2.0x), Tier 4 (2.5x/3.0x). (7) SovereignContext fetches multipliers and exposes them to OrbitalNavigation. (8) NebulaSphere applies multipliers to physics (gravity) and visuals (bloom). (9) BubblePortal activates on double-tap of NebulaSphere. Test user grad_test_522@test.com is at Tier 1 (Novice/Seeker) with some lesson progress in Tech/Dev and Spotless Solutions avenues.

backend_record_mixer_collision.details: POST /api/sovereign-mastery/record with action=mixer_collision increments collision count

backend_avenues_endpoint.details: GET /api/sovereign-mastery/avenues returns all 3 avenues with curriculum
